context: Tests whether the agent sets up lane-independent change detection that only builds/deploys affected apps, uses correct concurrency settings (non-cancellable deploy, cancellable verify/e2e, same group key across main.yml and deploy.yml), and uses the correct job condition syntax for deploy gates.

checklist.name: paths-filter for detection
checklist.description: Uses dorny/paths-filter@v4 (not v2 or v3) to detect which lane changed

checklist.name: Lockfile in filter
checklist.description: The paths-filter includes the package lockfile (package-lock.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, yarn.lock, or similar) in at least one lane's filter rules

checklist.name: fetch-depth 0 on changes job
checklist.description: The changes/detect job's checkout step includes `fetch-depth: 0`

checklist.name: Lane conditional build
checklist.description: Each verify/build job has an `if:` condition that gates it on the corresponding lane being detected as changed (referencing the changes job output)

checklist.name: Deploy non-cancellable
checklist.description: The deploy job(s) include `concurrency: { cancel-in-progress: false }` (or equivalent)

checklist.name: Verify/e2e cancellable
checklist.description: At least one verify or e2e job includes `concurrency: { cancel-in-progress: true }` (or equivalent)

checklist.name: Concurrency group lane-scoped
checklist.description: The deploy concurrency group key is scoped to (environment, lane) — e.g. `deploy-production-web` — NOT scoped to `${{ github.ref }}`

checklist.name: Shared concurrency key
checklist.description: The deploy concurrency group key in main.yml and in deploy.yml (or the manual re-deploy section) uses the same string value

checklist.name: Explicit result check
checklist.description: Deploy job `if:` condition uses `needs.<job>.result == 'success'` (NOT `success()`) for each upstream dependency

checklist.name: Manual deploy workflow
checklist.description: A separate workflow_dispatch workflow exists (deploy.yml or equivalent) for manually re-deploying a specific ref without re-running verify

checklist.name: ref input to checkout
checklist.description: The manual deploy workflow's checkout step passes `ref: ${{ inputs.ref }}` (or equivalent) to ensure the requested ref is checked out

checklist.name: Independent lane verification
checklist.description: The written explanation or workflow structure shows that a change to only one app does not trigger the build/deploy of the other app (each lane's jobs are gated independently)
